stereotype: «ResourceAccess» — infrastructure-opaque Project head-state aggregate; atomic business verbs; imports no Temporal
volatility: Persistence volatility: the backing store for the Project head-state aggregate (Postgres today; git JSON + ref-CAS after D-PA-R re-cut). The atomic business verbs and typed Method models are stable across substrate swaps.

inbound.name: systemDesignManager
inbound.how: Activity-wrapped; Manager derives idempotencyKey and carries expectedVersion

inbound.name: projectDesignManager
inbound.how: Activity-wrapped; Manager derives idempotencyKey and carries expectedVersion

inbound.name: constructionManager
inbound.how: Activity-wrapped; Manager derives idempotencyKey and carries expectedVersion

ops.signature: stageArtifactForReview(projectId, expectedVersion, model ArtifactModel, cred RepoCredential, idempotencyKey) → Version
ops.note: Stores model in the slot its concrete type selects and sets that slot's status to AwaitingReview. Carries the typed model; the single content write. cred added by D-PA-R substrate swap.

fields.name: Model
fields.note: closed sum: System | UseCase | MissionStatement | Glossary | Volatilities | CoreUseCases | ScrubbedRequirements | OperationalConcepts | StandardCheck | Phase-2 sketches

fields.name: Cred
fields.note: opaque {Bytes, ExpiresAt}; Manager-threaded; added by D-PA-R

fields.name: (value)
fields.note: new per-aggregate state-commit token after successful mutation

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: Conflict | NotFound | Transient | Infrastructure | RateLimited | ContractMisuse | Auth

ops.signature: commitArtifact(projectId, expectedVersion, kind ArtifactKind, cred RepoCredential, idempotencyKey) → Version
ops.note: Sets named slot to Committed. Review verb — pure status transition; model already in slot from stageArtifactForReview.

fields.name: Kind
fields.note: discriminator for the slot to commit

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: Conflict | NotFound | Transient | Infrastructure | RateLimited | ContractMisuse | Auth

ops.signature: rejectArtifact(projectId, expectedVersion, kind ArtifactKind, notes string, cred RepoCredential, idempotencyKey) → Version
ops.note: Sets slot to Rejected with architect's notes. Model retained for redraft baseline.

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: Conflict | NotFound | Transient | Infrastructure | RateLimited | ContractMisuse | Auth

ops.signature: withdrawArtifact(projectId, expectedVersion, kind ArtifactKind, notes string, cred RepoCredential, idempotencyKey) → Version
ops.note: Sets slot to Withdrawn with architect's notes.

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: Conflict | NotFound | Transient | Infrastructure | RateLimited | ContractMisuse | Auth

ops.signature: advancePhase(projectId, expectedVersion, cred RepoCredential, idempotencyKey) → Version
ops.note: Seals current phase and moves Phase forward. Manager has already gated on all required slots being Committed.

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: Conflict | NotFound | Transient | Infrastructure | RateLimited | ContractMisuse | Auth

ops.signature: setResearchInput(projectId, expectedVersion, research ResearchInput, cred RepoCredential, idempotencyKey) → Version
ops.note: Sets the project's ResearchInput field (replace-in-place). Records a Method INPUT, not a co-authored artifact — no review status, no slot transition. Added 2026-05-29 (FROZEN 2026-05-30).

fields.name: Research
fields.note: struct{Sources []ResearchSource} — Phase-1 research corpus; NOT an ArtifactModel

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: Conflict | NotFound | Transient | Infrastructure | RateLimited | ContractMisuse | Auth

ops.note: Returns the whole head-state aggregate including every populated typed-model slot, ResearchInput, Construction facet (§2-DELTA), and ActivityGit map (§GIT). NotFound if no aggregate yet.

fields.name: Construction
fields.note: nil until Phase 3; App-A business-state rollup (§2-DELTA)

fields.name: ActivityGit
fields.note: nil until Phase 3 / first Record*; keyed by ActivityID (§GIT)

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: NotFound | Transient | Infrastructure | RateLimited | Auth

dataContracts: ProjectID = uuid.UUID  // canonical; not a custom string type
Version = uint64  // opaque optimistic-concurrency token; 0 = no aggregate yet; meaning re-cut in D-PA-R from Postgres counter to opaque per-aggregate state-commit token
RepoCredential  // opaque {Bytes, ExpiresAt}; canonical in sourceControlAccess.md §3.2; Manager-threaded, never minted/cached here
ArtifactModel  // closed sum type: System | UseCase | MissionStatement | Glossary | Volatilities | CoreUseCases | ScrubbedRequirements | OperationalConcepts | StandardCheck | Phase-2 sketches
ArtifactKind  // enum discriminator for generic verbs and slot lookup
ArtifactSlot struct { Status ArtifactReviewStatus; Model ArtifactModel }  // AwaitingReview | Committed | Rejected | Withdrawn
ResearchInput struct { Sources []ResearchSource }  // Phase-1 research corpus; a Method INPUT, NOT an ArtifactModel
Project struct { /* named typed slots + ResearchInput + Construction *ConstructionState + ActivityGit map[string]ActivityGitStatus */ }
ConstructionState struct { Activities []ActivityRecord; EarnedValue []EvWeek; Week int; HandOffModel string }  // §2-DELTA; nil until Phase 3

ActivityGitStatus struct { ActivityID; BranchName; BranchRef; PullRequestRef; CICheck CICheckState; ArchApproved bool; Merged bool; CRLabel string; IsRevert bool; UpdatedAt time.Time }  // §GIT; provider-opaque
errorModel: ProjectStateAccessError is framework-go/resourceaccess.Error. Kinds: Conflict (optimistic-concurrency loser — non-fast-forward push or stale expectedVersion; terminal at Activity level, handled by Manager workflow-level re-read→re-apply) / NotFound (addressed project has no aggregate yet; terminal) / Transient / Infrastructure / RateLimited (retryable) / ContractMisuse (violated pre-condition — terminal) / Auth (rejected/expired RepoCredential — terminal; adopted at D-PA-R senior review Q3 to match frozen git siblings). No public duplicate error — retried idempotencyKey returns prior committed Version as success.
idempotency: Dedup-first ordering: every write verb probes for applied_mutations/<idempotencyKey>.json (in-repo committed file after D-PA-R) first. HIT → return stored resultVersion as no-op success, ignoring expectedVersion. MISS → apply transition + write applied_mutations record in the SAME commit, then CAS-push to main. This preserves idempotent replay even when a retry re-passes a stale expectedVersion.

revisions.summary: Replaced ArtifactRef + blob-in-artifactAccess with typed Method-artifact models in named slots. ArtifactRef deleted. artifactAccess is now Phase-3 only. 7 ops (6 writes + 1 read). SENIOR REVIEW PASSED (2026-05-26).

Non-behavioral: typed Method models physically moved to the projectstate Go package (internal/resourceaccess/projectstate/); interim internal/domain package deleted (architectural mistake). Interface unchanged.

Additive: ResearchInput Method-INPUT field added to Project aggregate + setResearchInput verb (total ops 6→7). Not an ArtifactModel; no review lifecycle. FROZEN 2026-05-30 (architect/senior sign-off).

Substrate swap: Postgres head-state row → git JSON under .aiarch/state/; optimistic concurrency is git ref compare-and-swap; idempotency is in-repo applied_mutation committed file; cross-project registry index moves to dedicated aiarch-registry repo. All verbs gain Manager-threaded cred RepoCredential parameter (REWORK.4). Version re-meant from Postgres counter to opaque state-commit token (type/role unchanged). Verbs + typed models frozen/unchanged.

APPROVE-AND-FREEZE. Concurrency obligation discharged (ref-CAS convergence + dedup-first retry independently stress-tested). Open Q1 realizable on GitHub (branch-protection bypass actor). Q2 ruled: registry repo is well-known deterministic name provisioned once at install, no second surface change. Q3 ruled: adopt Auth error kind. Q4/Q5 ruled. Editorial mayAmends applied.

Additive: ConstructionState / ActivityRecord / EvWeek read projection pinned on readProject's Project aggregate for the Construction Tracker. No new verb. Confirmed 2026-06-07 by founder. Construction-refinable field layout.

Additive: ActivityGitStatus aggregate + 4 Record* verbs on (Git)ConstructionTransitionAccess facet (separate from core ProjectStateAccess). Stores provider-opaque rail returns (BranchRef, PullRequestRef, CICheckState, ArchApproved, Merged). FROZEN 2026-06-12 with FREEZE-WITH-MINOR-AMENDMENTS (5 OQs ruled). PullRequestURL NOT stored.
